#  Can I upload drawings with the same revision? 
##  Background 
While it is best practice to _not_ have duplicate drawing revision names or numbers in Procore, there might be situations where you need to enter the same drawing revision in order to match what was received from the design team.
##  Answer 
Yes. You can upload drawings with the same revision name or number. However, at least one of the following fields must be unique when reviewing and confirming the drawings:
  * Drawing Date
  * Received Date
  * Drawing Set

title: Can I upload drawings with the same revision?
